map_coverage: {done} kwamadolobha angu-{total} ahlaziywe kuze kube manje - amanye ayengezwa usuku nosuku.
cur_so_far: {year} kuze kube manje (kuya ku-{day} {month}): {v} °C ngokwesilinganiso, {d} °C uma kuqhathaniswa no-1961-1990 kusho izinsuku ezifanayo zonyaka.
cmp_hint: Ijika ngalinye liwukungahambi kahle kwaminyaka yonke kwalelo dolobha uma liqhathaniswa nesisekelo salo sango-1961-1990, ngakho izindawo ezinesimo sezulu esihlukile ziqhathanisa ngokufanelekile.
sum_season: Isizini yokufudumala eshesha kakhulu lapha: {season} ({v} °C ngeshumi leminyaka).
sum_month: Inyanga eshisa kakhulu lapha: {month} ({v} °C ngeshumi leminyaka).
grid_alias_note: Irekhodi lokushisa libalwa ~11 km ngeseli yegridi yedatha yesimo sezulu. {alias} yabelana ngeseli layo no-{city}, ngakho-ke zombili zibonisa umlando ofanayo wamanje we-1940.
guide_body:
• Amachashazi / amabha: inani lonyaka ngamunye.
  • Ijika elinombala ogqamile: i-LOESS ebushelelezi: ithrendi yendawo, ekhululekile ukugoba, ukuze ukwazi ukubona ukufudumala kwesilinganiso ngokuhamba kwesikhathi (e.c. ~1985).
  • Umugqa odayishiwe: ithrendi eqondile (Theil-Sen); ukuthambeka kwayo kuyisibalo “seshumi ngalinye leminyaka” enganekwaneni.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Ukubaluleka kukaMann-Kendall: noma ngabe ithrendi ingokoqobo ngokwezibalo noma ingaba nje umsindo (n.s. = ayibalulekile). Izinga lokushisa ngokuvamile libaluleke kakhulu; imvula ngokuvamile ayibi.
  • Ibhande elinomthunzi: ububanzi obugcwele bomlando kuyo yonke iminyaka yaleyo nyanga.
  • Imibala ye-heatmap: izinga lokushisa eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka → ukushisa okuluhlaza → funda ikholomu ukusuka phansi kuye phezulu ukuze ubuke leyo nyanga ishintsha phakathi neminyaka.
yearly_title: Izinga lokushisa elimaphakathi lonyaka phakathi neminyaka, {name}
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} izinsuku · ukufudumala {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), kubanda {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
analog_line: Ngo-2050, isimo sezulu sasendaweni singazizwa ngendlela {analog} esenza ngayo namuhla, cishe ngo-+{d} °C ukufudumala.
analog_past: Ngo-1940, isimo sezulu sasendaweni sazizwa sinjenge-{analog} namuhla, cishe {d} °C esipholile.
cap_yearly: Incazelo yonyaka ene-LOESS ebushelelezi (ibonisa ukusheshisa) kanye nethrendi eqinile ye-Theil-Sen +ukubaluleka
cap_anomalies: Unyaka ngamunye uma kuqhathaniswa nesilinganiso sango-1961-1990: amabha abomvu afudumele, apholile aluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka. Ukushintsha kusuka kokuluhlaza kakhulu kuya kokubomvu kakhulu ukufudumala.
cap_heatmap: Isilinganiso sanyanga zonke saminyaka yonke njengegridi yombala (amabhendi angu-2 °C). Funda ikholomu phezulu ukuze ubuke leyo nyanga ifudumele phakathi namashumi eminyaka.
cap_anom_heatmap: Igridi efanayo, kodwa inyanga ngayinye ilinganiswa ngokumelene neyayo 1961-1990 evamile, ngakho-ke izinguquko kuphela ezibonisa (ukufudumala okubomvu kunokuvamile, okupholile okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka), umjikelezo wesizini ususiwe.
cap_threshold: Izinsuku unyaka ngamunye ngaphezu kuka-18 °C (kushisa) nangaphansi kuka-0 °C (ukubanda). Amathrendi amabili aqinile awela kusho izinsuku ezishisayo manje zidlula izinsuku ezibandayo.
hint: Chofoza noma yikuphi noma cindezela u-Esc ukuze uvale
intro: Ukuthi amadolobha amakhulu omhlaba afudumale kanjani kusukela ngo-1940: amarekhodi okushisa nsuku zonke kusukela ku-ERA5 yokuhlaziya kabusha isimo sezulu.
omni_ph: Sesha idolobha, izwe, isifunda nanoma iyiphi indawo
range_title: Izinga lokushisa lanyanga zonke phakathi neminyaka, {name}
cap_range: Ibanga elincane lenyanga ngayinye phakathi neminyaka, nonyaka wakamuva. Ingabe ukwanga unqenqema olufudumele?
record_title: Ukurekhoda kwanyanga zonke izinga lokushisa lansuku zonke eliphezulu/eliphansi, {name}
cap_records: Irekhodi lenyanga ngayinye lasikhathi sonke lansuku zonke liphezulu futhi liphansi, nokudlulela kwakamuva konyaka
volatility_title: Izinga lokushisa lansuku zonke liyashintsha ngonyaka, {name}
cap_volatility: Kukangaki ukweqa okukhulu kwezinga lokushisa kwansuku zonke kwenzeka njalo ngonyaka (≥6 °C), ukuhlukahluka kwezinga lokushisa
cap_precip: Isamba semvula yaminyaka yonke (imvula namanzi eqhwa) anethrendi
cap_stripes: Umugqa ngamunye izinga lokushisa lonyaka owodwa: okupholile okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, ukufudumala okubomvu kunesilinganiso sika-1961-1990. Ukukhukhuleka ukusuka kokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka kuye kokubomvu ukufudumala, akukho ongakufunda ngaphandle kombala.
cap_season: Ubude benkathi yokukhula eshisayo unyaka ngamunye (ubude bezinsuku ezinesilinganiso sansuku zonke esingu-≥ 5 °C): ukulima kwamafasitela angenasithwathwa kuncike ekunwebeni lapho isimo sezulu sishisa.
cap_dtr: Igebe elimaphakathi phakathi kokuphezulu nokuphansi kosuku ngalunye. Uhla olunciphayo luwuphawu lweminwe olubamba ukushisa: ubusuku bufudumala ngokushesha kunezinsuku; ukunwebeka kungabonisa ukomisa.
cap_seasonshift: Isilinganiso sonyaka wokuqala uma kuqhathaniswa neshumi leminyaka lokugcina lerekhodi. Igebe phakathi kwamajika enyangeni ngayinye libonisa ukuthi yiziphi izingxenye zonyaka ezifudumala kakhulu (imvamisa ubusika bungaphezu kwehlobo).
health_sub: Ukuthi amathrendi okufudumala angenhla ahumusheka kanjani kumamethrikhi okuchayeka okushisa, ukubanda kanye nemicimbi eyeqisayo. Ishadi ngalinye livela lapho idatha eliyidingayo itholakala khona.
cap_degreedays: Umthwalo waminyaka yonke wokunethezeka kwe-thermal: isidingo sokushisisa (ngaphansi kuka-18 °C) siyehla ngenkathi isidingo sokupholisa sikhuphuka (ngaphezulu kuka-22 °C) sikhuphuka, ummeleli wokuchayeka okubandayo kanye nesidingo se-air-conditioning.
cap_heatwave: Izinsuku kugagasi lokushisa: ukugijima kwezinsuku ezingu-≥3 ngokuphakama kwansuku zonke ngaphezu kwe-1961-1990 90th percentile. Ukushisa okuqhubekayo kwasemini kuyimbangela eyinhloko yokufa okudlulele kwamagagasi okushisa.
cap_tropic: Ubusuku lapho ukwehla kuhlala ku-20 °C noma ngaphezulu, ukuze umzimba ungatholi ukukhululeka ebusuku, umshayeli oholayo, ovame ukunganakwa ekufeni okuhlobene nokushisa.
cap_coldspell: Izinsuku ezibandayo: ukugijima kwezinsuku ezingu-≥3 nokwehla kwansuku zonke ngaphansi kwephesenti le-10 lendawo lika-1961-1990. Ukubanda okuhlala isikhathi eside kubangela ukufa okweqile kwenhliziyo nemithambo yokuphefumula ebusika.
cap_heavyrain: Izinsuku ezinemvula okungenani engu-20 mm (ETCCDI R20mm), izimvula ezidala izikhukhula eziletha ukulimala, ukufuduka kanye nesifo esibangelwa amanzi.
cap_heatindex: Izinsuku izinga lokushisa elibonakalayo (inkomba yokushisa, egoqeka ngokuswakama) ifinyelela amazinga okucindezela ukushisa, kusetshenziswa izeluleko zokushisa zomphakathi zemethrikhi. Idinga idathasethi yezinga lokushisa elibonakalayo.
footer: Kwenziwe {date} · idatha evela ku-Open-Meteo ukuhlaziywa kabusha komlando (ERA5) · umthombo ku-GitHub
qv_baseline: Izilinganiso zeminyaka eyishumi uma ziqhathaniswa nesisekelo sango-1961-1990
qv_chart_alt: Ukufudumala kweshumi neshumi leminyaka, ishadi lendawo eligcwele
